ListItem.Para: Inoperative CMSC is deactivated.
Associated VFSG starter system is considered inoperative.
Associated cabin air compressor is considered inoperative.
For CMSC L1 inoperative, left ASG starter is considered inoperative.

Note.Para: For CMSC L1 inoperative, the airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 21-51-01, 24-22-01-04 and 24-22-02-03.
For CMSC L2 inoperative, the airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 21-51-01 and 24-22-01-04.
For CMSC R1 inoperative, the airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 21-51-01 and 24-22-01-04.
For CMSC R2 inoperative, the airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 21-51-01 and 24-22-01-04.
An inoperative CMSC may be removed provided dispatch tool K24002 is installed.

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the associated circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
For CMSC L1 inoperative:
CMSC-L1 CHAN 1
For CMSC L2 inoperative:
CMSC-L2 CHAN 1
For CMSC R1 inoperative:
CMSC-R1 CHAN 1
For CMSC R2 inoperative:
CMSC-R2 CHAN 1
For CMSC L2 or CMSC R2 inoperative, do not operate the associated air conditioning pack on the ground when OAT is greater than 40 degrees C
To minimize PECS heating, operators should consider the following options:
Set packs OFF and use pre-conditioned air prior to engine start.
Delay closing forward or aft cargo doors until airplane is ready for push back or engine start.
Minimize APU ground operations.
Start APU prior to closing cargo doors.
Minimize time between cargo door closing and first engine start.
Each engine should be started individually at the gate.

Para.rev:revHighlight: MISC SYSTEM CTRLS page does not provide the necessary data to confirm the ram air fan is operating.

ListItem.Para: For CMSC L1 or L2 inoperative, On MISC SYSTEM CTRLS (MSC) maintenance page, confirm right ram fan is operating:
Select "SYS" switch on the Display Select Panel to display the SYS page on an MFD.
Select the MAINT button on the SYS menu.
Select the DISPLAY button for "21 AIR CONDITIONING".
On AIR CONDITIONING maintenance page 2, confirm RAM FAN SPEED KRPM under R is 6.0 or greater.
For CMSC R1 or R2 inoperative, On MISC SYSTEM CTRLS (MSC) maintenance page, confirm left ram fan is operating:
Select "SYS" switch on the Display Select Panel to display the SYS page on an MFD.
Select the MAINT button on the SYS menu.
Select the DISPLAY button for "21 AIR CONDITIONING".
On AIR CONDITIONING maintenance page 2, confirm RAM FAN. SPEED KRPM under L is 6.0 or greater.
On POWER ELEC COOLING maintenance page 1, confirm SUPPLY TEMP of left and right PECS loop is 142 degrees F (61 degrees C) or lower.
Start APU
Start first engine.

Note.Para: Engine start time will be longer than normal

ListItem.Para: Start second engine.
Shutdown APU.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative provided associated center hydraulic system electric motor-driven pump is considered inoperative.

Note.Para: An inoperative CMSC for a center system hydraulic pump will cause the associated center system hydraulic pump to be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 29-11-02.

MaintenanceNote.Para: An inoperative CMSC may be removed provided dispatch tool K24002 is installed.
